Name: UForceFeedbackComponent
Description: ForceFeedbackComponent allows placing a rumble effect in to the world and having it apply to player characters who come near it

Variables.Name: ForceFeedbackEffect
Variables.Description: The feedback effect to be played

Variables.Name: bAutoDestroy
Variables.Description: Auto destroy this component on completion

Variables.Name: bStopWhenOwnerDestroyed
Variables.Description: Stop effect when owner is destroyed

Variables.Name: bIgnoreTimeDilation
Variables.Description: Should the playback of the forcefeedback pattern ignore time dilation and use the app's delta time

Variables.Name: bOverrideAttenuation
Variables.Description: Should the Attenuation Settings asset be used (false) or should the properties set directly on the component be used for attenuation properties

Variables.Name: IntensityMultiplier
Variables.Description: The intensity multiplier to apply to effects generated by this component

Variables.Name: AttenuationSettings
Variables.Description: If bOverrideSettings is false, the asset to use to determine attenuation properties for effects generated by this component

Variables.Name: AttenuationOverrides
Variables.Description: If bOverrideSettings is true, the attenuation properties to use for effects generated by this component

Functions.Name: SetForceFeedbackEffect
Functions.Description: Set what force feedback effect is played by this component

Functions.Name: AdjustAttenuation
Functions.Description: Modify the attenuation settings of the component

Delegate.Name: OnForceFeedbackFinished
Delegate.Description: called when we finish playing audio, either because it played to completion or because a Stop() call turned it off early
